mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, nickname, email, phone, gender, birthdate, icon_url, role, social_type, social_id, line_agreed) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{birthdate}, #{iconUrl}, #{role}, #{socialType}, #{socialId}, #{lineAgreed})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE social_type = #{socialType} AND social_id = #{socialId}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, gender = #{gender}, birthdate = #{birthdate}, icon_url = #{iconUrl}, line_agreed = #{lineAgreed} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
